name: ForgeRock Accounts Deprovisioned on Termination
description: Ensures ForgeRock access is revoked when personnel leave the company
query: SELECT f.id, f.username, f.email, e.termination_date FROM forgerock_users f JOIN employees e ON LOWER(f.email) = LOWER(e.work_email) WHERE e.status = 'terminated' AND COALESCE(f.active, true) = true
remediation: Disable or remove accounts for terminated employees within 24 hours. Automate offboarding workflows where possible.
